---
name: "Group Meeting Brief"
description: "Prepare a short group meeting brief from recent papers, ideas, and reports in DailyRead."
argument-hint: "topic, date range, or selected note keys"
agent: "agent"
---

Prepare a short group meeting brief.

The brief should include:

- what was read recently
- the most important technical takeaways
- what ideas were generated or updated
- unresolved questions
- the next concrete steps

Keep it short enough for a verbal update.
